metadata.description: HarnessFlow — From idea to shipped product: high-quality engineering workflows for AI agents. Spec-anchored SDD, gated TDD, evidence-based routing, independent reviews, and formal closeout.

plugins.name: harness-flow
plugins.description: HarnessFlow skill pack: 24 hf-* skills covering discovery -> spec -> design -> tasks -> TDD -> reviews -> gates -> finalize -> verify (hf-browser-testing, v0.2.0) -> release (hf-release, v0.4.0), with evidence-based routing. v0.3.0 adds Cursor as the third officially-supported client (Claude Code + OpenCode + Cursor); v0.4.0 introduces hf-release as a standalone release-tier skill decoupled from the router (engineer-level release; deployment / staged rollout / monitoring / rollback remain v0.5+ planned hf-shipping-and-launch).
